query:
SELECT
            ora.user_id,
            otr.classification_id,
            otr.start_time,
            otr.end_time
        FROM ot_request_assignments ora
        JOIN ot_requests otr ON otr.id = ora.ot_request_id
        WHERE otr.org_id = $1 AND otr.date = $2
          AND ora.cancelled_at IS NULL
          AND otr.status != 'cancelled'
